title: Sync sina-governance-SSOT canonical checkout to origin/main (preserve the 8 untracked receipts/app-runway/ files)

worktree_main_conflict_check.note: Every linked worktree was on a side branch or detached HEAD; no worktree held main, so checkout of main in the canonical dir was permitted.

before.branch_vs_its_upstream: 0 ahead / 0 behind origin/chore/internal-operating-goals-abc (fully pushed; safe to leave)
before.clobber_precheck: git ls-tree -r origin/main -- receipts/app-runway/ grepped against all 8 untracked filenames: zero collisions (grep exit 1), so neither checkout nor fast-forward could overwrite them.

actions: git merge --ff-only origin/main  (Fast-forward c7eb116..1be6c03; 151 files changed, 23063 insertions(+), 353 deletions(-))

after.git_status_porcelain: exactly the same 8 untracked ?? receipts/app-runway/ lines; zero modified tracked files

enforcement_script_run.command: python3 scripts/verify_wiring_commissioning_v1.py --no-write --json  (run from worktrees/_wt-sg-product-lock, read-only; --no-write used so nothing was written into the worktree)

honest_notes: PASS is written because every pass condition was directly observed after the merge: branch==main, HEAD==origin/main (1be6c03), zero dirty tracked files, all 8 untracked receipts present, and the contract's own enforcement script independently computed W0-03=DONE with lock_check=VERIFIED.

This receipt is deliberately left UNTRACKED (not committed): the git_synced exit gate requires HEAD == origin/main, so any local commit on main would immediately un-sync the checkout and flip W0-03 back to failing. The gate explicitly ignores untracked (??) files.
No push was performed. No worktree was created, modified, or removed. Nothing under worktrees/ was touched except read-only reads and a --no-write script run.
